mapper.select:
SELECT pa.attempt_no AS requestNo, pa.payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, pa.prepay_order_no AS prepayOrderNo, po.order_no AS orderNo, pa.payment_method AS paymentMethod, pa.channel_code AS channelCode, latest_route.route_result AS routeResult, pa.terminal AS terminal, pa.client_ip AS clientIp, pa.idempotency_key AS idempotencyKey, pa.attempt_status AS requestStatus, pa.attempt_status_type AS requestStatusType, pa.request_payload AS requestPayload, pa.response_payload AS responsePayload, DATE_FORMAT(pa.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createdAt FROM t_payment_attempt pa LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pa.payment_order_id LEFT JOIN t_payment_route_record latest_route ON latest_route.id = ( SELECT prr.id FROM t_payment_route_record prr WHERE prr.payment_order_id = pa.payment_order_id ORDER BY prr.created_at DESC, prr.id DESC LIMIT 1 )
pa.attempt_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.requestNo}, '%')
AND pa.payment_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.paymentOrderId}, '%')
AND po.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.orderNo}, '%')
AND pa.channel_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.channelCode}, '%')
AND pa.terminal = #{query.terminal}
AND pa.client_ip LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.clientIp}, '%')
AND pa.attempt_status = #{query.requestStatus}
ORDER BY pa.channel_code
ORDER BY pa.terminal
ORDER BY pa.created_at
ASC
DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_payment_attempt pa LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pa.payment_order_id LEFT JOIN t_payment_route_record latest_route ON latest_route.id = ( SELECT prr.id FROM t_payment_route_record prr WHERE prr.payment_order_id = pa.payment_order_id ORDER BY prr.created_at DESC, prr.id DESC LIMIT 1 )
pa.attempt_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.requestNo}, '%')
AND pa.payment_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.paymentOrderId}, '%')
AND po.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.orderNo}, '%')
AND pa.channel_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.channelCode}, '%')
AND pa.terminal = #{query.terminal}
AND pa.client_ip LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.clientIp}, '%')
AND pa.attempt_status = #{query.requestStatus}
